mapper.insert: insert into emp(username, password, name, gender, phone, job, salary, image, entry_date, dept_id, create_time, update_time) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{job}, #{salary}, #{image}, #{entryDate}, #{deptId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select e.*, d.name deptName from emp e left join dept d on e.dept_id = d.id where e.id = #{id}
select (case job when 1 then '班主任' when 2 then '讲师' when 3 then '学工主管' when 4 then '教研主管' when 5 then '咨询师' else '其他' end) as pos, count(*) as num from emp group by job order by job
